How much should a business budget for a Headless CMS website in 2026?
Typical projects range from **$2,500 for a focused starter website to $50,000+ for an enterprise content platform**.
Our latest guide explains development, migration, hosting, integrations, multilingual workflows, AI Content Agent, MCP Server and AI-ready content architecture.
#headlesscms #sanitycms #nextjs #aicms #webdevelopment
